title: 复核 v0.5.24 发布后治理门禁

sources.reason: Remote smoke result is the post-release verification evidence.
Confirms the immutable public release exists.

riskAssessment.reason: This Work Item only records post-release CI gate verification and adds no runtime changes.

executionDecision.reason: The Work Item records a bounded remote gate verification.

preReviewWarnings: Confirm the latest smoke run passes without modifying prior release evidence.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: The latest remote smoke run passes its AI PR gate.
The v0.5.24 public release remains available and unchanged.
The Work Item is archived as append-only evidence.
guidelines: Do not modify historical release evidence.
Record verification results without changing product behavior.

intent.problem: The repository smoke workflow requires every push to carry a valid archived Work Item and must be rechecked after the release evidence archive was finalized.
constraints: Do not modify v0.5.24 or v0.5.23.
Append only a new verification archive pair.
intent.rationale: A dedicated verification archive makes the final remote gate result auditable without reopening the completed release Work Item.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User authorized continued release and CI gate handling.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
